<wiki_structure>
  <title>English Speaking Trainer Android 应用 Wiki</title><description>一个基于Kotlin开发的Android应用，通过TED Talks和Psych2Go文章及音频练习英语口语和语感。提供文章阅读、语音模仿、单词查询、悬浮球查词等功能。</description>
  <sections>
    <section id="section-1">
      <title>项目概览</title>
      <pages>
        <page_ref>page-1</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-2</page_ref>
      </pages>
    </section>
    <section id="section-2">
      <title>核心功能</title><pages>
        <page_ref>page-3</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-4</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-5</page_ref><page_ref>page-6</page_ref>
      </pages>
    </section><section id="section-3">
      <title>技术实现</title><pages>
        <page_ref>page-7</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-8</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-9</page_ref></pages>
    </section>
    <section id="section-4">
      <title>开发与维护</title><pages>
        <page_ref>page-10</page_ref>
        <page_ref>page-11</page_ref><page_ref>page-12</page_ref>
      </pages>
    </section>
  </sections>
  <pages>
    <page id="page-1">
      <title>项目简介</title>
      <description>介绍English Speaking Trainer应用的基本信息、主要功能和目标用户。</description>
      <importance>high</importance>
      <relevant_files>
        <file_path>README.md</file_path>
      </relevant_files>
      <related_pages>
        <related>page-2</related>
      </related_pages>

    </page>
    <page id="page-4"><title>语音模仿与音频控制</title>
      <description>描述音频播放、倍速调节、进度控制、时间戳同步和音频焦点管理的技术细节。</description>
      <importance>high</importance>
      <relevant_files>

      </relevant_files>
      <related_pages>

      </related_pages>
      <parent_section>section-2</parent_section>
    </page><page id="page-5">
      <title>单词学习与查词功能</title>
